content:
# 数据表格

## 使用场景

后台管理系统中展示结构化数据的表格组件。适用于订单列表、用户管理、数据报表等需要多列展示和分页浏览的场景。

## 布局结构

垂直布局：表头行（浅灰背景 + 列标题加粗）→ 数据行（白色/交替灰色背景）→ 分页控件区。表头固定，列宽按内容类型分配。

示例为 4 列表格（序号、名称、状态、操作），宽度 680px，含 2 行数据和底部分页条。

## 节点树示例

```json
{
  "type": "group",
  "id": "data-table-root",
  "name": "数据表格",
  "transform": {
    "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
    "size": { "width": 680, "height": 236 },
    "rotation": 0,
    "opacity": 1
  },
  "zIndex": 0,
  "locked": false,
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "table-header-bg",
      "name": "表头背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 680, "height": 44 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#FAFAFA" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-header-col1",
      "name": "表头-序号",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 16, "y": 12 },
        "size": { "width": 60, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "序号",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-header-col2",
      "name": "表头-名称",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 96, "y": 12 },
        "size": { "width": 200, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "名称",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-header-col3",
      "name": "表头-状态",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 360, "y": 12 },
        "size": { "width": 120, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "状态",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-header-col4",
      "name": "表头-操作",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 560, "y": 12 },
        "size": { "width": 100, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "操作",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "table-row1-bg",
      "name": "第一行背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 44 },
        "size": { "width": 680, "height": 52 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-row1-col1",
      "name": "行1-序号",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 16, "y": 60 },
        "size": { "width": 60, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "1",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-row1-col2",
      "name": "行1-名称",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 96, "y": 60 },
        "size": { "width": 200, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "示例项目名称",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-row1-col3",
      "name": "行1-状态",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 360, "y": 60 },
        "size": { "width": 120, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "进行中",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#52C41A", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-row1-col4",
      "name": "行1-操作",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 560, "y": 60 },
        "size": { "width": 100, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "编辑 | 删除",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#1677FF", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "table-row2-bg",
      "name": "第二行背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 96 },
        "size": { "width": 680, "height": 52 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#FAFAFA" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-row2-col1",
      "name": "行2-序号",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 16, "y": 112 },
        "size": { "width": 60, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "2",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-row2-col2",
      "name": "行2-名称",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 96, "y": 112 },
        "size": { "width": 200, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "另一个项目",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "table-pagination-bg",
      "name": "分页栏背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 192 },
        "size": { "width": 680, "height": 44 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-pagination-info",
      "name": "分页信息",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 16, "y": 204 },
        "size": { "width": 200, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "共 50 条记录",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#8C8C8C", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "table-pagination-pages",
      "name": "分页页码",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 480, "y": 204 },
        "size": { "width": 180, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "< 1  2  3  4  5 >",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#1677FF", "align": "right", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 设计要点

- 表头背景色 #FAFAFA，文字加粗 14px，与数据行形成层次区分
- 数据行高度 52px，文字垂直居中，奇偶行交替底色（白色/#FAFAFA）
- 状态列根据状态值使用语义色：进行中 #52C41A，已关闭 #8C8C8C，异常 #FF4D4F
- 操作列使用主色 #1677FF 表示可点击
- 分页栏左侧显示总记录数，右侧显示页码导航
- 整体无外边框，通过行底色区分边界

metadata.description: 数据表格：表头 + 行列结构 + 分页控件
